evals.name: basic-start-existing-issue
evals.prompt: hey can you start working on issue #37 from github? i think it's about project cleanup. just need to get the branch set up and a plan generated so i can start coding
evals.expected_output: Branch created (feature/37-*), plan file created at .claude/plans/active/issue-37-plan.md with tasks extracted from issue body, synced with main, ready message displayed

evals.name: create-new-issue-on-fly
evals.prompt: ok so i found a bug - the login button is misaligned on mobile. can you create an issue for this and start working on it? label it as bug and P1
evals.expected_output: New issue created on GitHub with title about login button alignment, labeled bug+P1, branch created, plan generated, ready to work

evals.name: bugfix-custom-prefix
evals.prompt: start issue #48 but use 'fix' as the branch prefix instead of feature since it's a bugfix
evals.expected_output: Branch created as fix/48-* (not feature/48-*), plan generated, synced, ready message
